title: Trusted post-merge repair can bind a missing PR URL

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Final substantive implementation commit, including rollback-safe coordination snapshots, control-plane filtering from files_changed, and staging of the terminal sync-file deletion. Post-merge proof generation rebinds this field to the authoritative GitHub merge SHA.

verifier.independence_note: Executor-produced mechanical evidence; this is not PM approval or independent certification.

pnpm_verify.detail: Static verification, the full unit suite, live database smoke tests, and the broader T1 live-proof battery passed.

focused_lane_close_tests.detail: Includes all 17 required trusted repair cases, transaction rollback, terminal cleanup, control-plane filtering, sync-deletion staging, regression guards, workflow forwarding, and the real UTV2-1585 PR #1305 fixture.

runtime_proof.classification: Governance tooling and workflow change; the live DB suite is the mandatory T1 runtime gate and does not exercise GitHub PR validation directly.

queries.description: database-smoke.test.ts persists a submission and settlement through the live database repository bundle and cleans up its fixtures.
database-smoke.test.ts verifies invalid atomic enqueue, delivery, and settlement operations leave no partial lifecycle writes.
database-smoke.test.ts verifies invalid atomic enqueue and delivery confirmation leave no partial outbox mutation.
database-smoke.test.ts verifies rollback behavior and additive correction audit writes.
database-smoke.test.ts verifies re-settlement creates additive corrections without mutating the original settlement.

runtime_proof.row_counts_note: Exact live table counts captured read-only through the Supabase REST API after pnpm verify completed its database smoke and T1 live-proof suites.

broader_live_proof.skip_reason: The latest provider snapshot was older than the bounded lookback window; the test classifies this as stale provider data rather than a code failure.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Only the exact trusted Post-Merge Lane Close context may supply an explicit PR.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: The new path consumes the existing isTrustedPostMergeAutomation result; local, ordinary CI, flag-only, and missing-repair invocations fail with distinct codes.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Validate the supplied PR completely before manifest mutation.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: Repository, existence, merged state, exact branch and issue title identity, authoritative merge SHA, original manifest/proof diff, conflicting binding, and main reachability are checked before repairMergedLaneManifest receives the PR.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Reject repair substitution and missing implementation artifacts distinctly.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: The candidate must contain the issue lane manifest plus every expected_proof_path; missing manifest and missing proof paths emit separate repair_pr_substitution and missing_implementation_artifacts codes.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Trusted workflow dispatch accepts an optional exact PR and forwards it only to the trusted repair command.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: workflow_dispatch exposes optional pr; a quoted shell argument array adds --pr only to ops:lane-close with --repair-merged and --post-merge-trusted.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Repair is transactional and reaches terminal cleanup or restores prior local state.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: Rollback snapshots manifest, proof tree, sync record, lease, and merge mutex before auto-acquiring the mutex. Failed repair removes coordination state created by the invocation; successful trusted repair finalizes done/closed_at, removes sync, stages that tracked deletion in the workflow, releases locks, and removes only the exact clean registered non-current worktree.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: All 17 required cases, including the UTV2-1585/#1305 fixture, are covered.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: Focused lane-close suite passes 108/108 and contains numbered UTV2-1586 cases 1 through 17 using merge SHA 97527b791fc37acce41f4f46fd88699dce054b66.

known_limitations: The trusted hosted runner can remove only a worktree present on that runner. A recorded path from another machine is treated as already absent there; the required local orchestration reconciliation remains the authority for machine-local stale worktrees.
The UTV2-1585 live workflow replay is explicitly a post-merge follow-up and is not performed by this implementation PR.
